description_long: This is a large, horizontally-oriented cylindrical storage tank with a weathered, reddish-orange exterior, showing signs of rust and wear. The tank is supported by two substantial concrete blocks, elevating it slightly above the ground. A circular access hatch is located on the top center of the tank, and a yellow metal ladder is attached to one side, providing access to the hatch. The surface of the tank displays streaks and patches of discoloration, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The ends of the cylinder are flat, and the tank appears to be made primarily of metal, likely steel, with visible weld seams and structural reinforcements. No visible pipes or valves are attached, and there is no warning signage present.
description: A weathered, horizontal cylindrical metal storage tank with a reddish-orange finish, supported by concrete blocks and featuring a yellow access ladder and top hatch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the access ladder, top hatch, and both supporting concrete blocks.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the circular face of the tank, the attached ladder curving over the top, and one supporting block.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tank's length, top hatch, and the ladder partially visible on the far side.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the flat end of the tank and the ladder wrapping over the top.
